subject: Re: Site visit schedule — East Baltimore neighborhood partners
body:
Sarah, Yemi — yes, please send the revised instruments to Marcus before the June 16 visit. Also make sure we have the updated IRB amendment on file for Site 3 before any data collection. I'll confirm once I check with Jamal that the data pipeline is ready on the backend.

Gerald

subject: Re: Brookhaven Arts Festival — set list ideas
body:
Dana — I like that opener idea. Let me pull up the chart and see if the key works for all of us. I can transpose if needed. Also thinking we should rehearse at least twice before November 7 — maybe Oct 11 and Oct 25 if we can get the community center.

Gerald
